title: L3 0BE, United Utilities Water Limited: environmental permit issued - EPR/HP3131LX/V010
body: "The Environment Agency publish permits that they issue under the Industrial Emissions Directive (IED).  This decision includes the permit and decision document for:    Operator name: United Utilities Water Limited   Installation name: Liverpool Wastewater Treatment Works Sludge Treatment Installation   Permit number: EPR/HP3131LX   "
